story: “Don’t put your hands in the pockets!” his sister warned about the blue denim coat with many zippers. “That’s where people keep wishes; don’t let them out.” Earlier, Grandma had privately shown his sister that escaped wishes can be called back by closing the opened zipper while speaking the thing’s name into the teeth. In a blizzard, a fob snagged; the big bottom pocket yawned. Jimmy fell, and a huge wolf rose from the quiet, growling. Heart pounding, he seized the zipper, trying to shut whatever had slipped free.
implausible_knowledge: Earlier, Grandma had privately shown his sister that escaped wishes can be called back by closing the opened zipper while speaking the thing’s name into the teeth.
question: When the wolf looms from the opened pocket, what will Jimmy most likely do to deal with it?
answer_with_knowledge: Zip the pocket while saying “Wolf, back in,” to call it back into the coat.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep yanking the zipper closed, trying to stuff the wolf-wish back into the pocket.
